nasb.text: If the whole body were an eye, where would the hearing be? If the whole were hearing, where would the sense of smell be?

esv.text: If the whole body were an eye, where would be the sense of hearing? If the whole body were an ear, where would be the sense of smell?

cnv.text: 假如整個身體只是眼睛，怎樣聽呢？假如整個身體只是耳朵，怎樣聞味呢？

ccb.text: 如果整个身体是一只眼睛，哪里有听觉呢？如果整个身体是一只耳朵，哪里有嗅觉呢？

csbs.text: 如果整个身体是个眼睛，那么听觉在哪里呢？如果整个身体是个耳朵，那么嗅觉在哪里呢？
